feed.title: Intercultural Pragmatics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Intercultural Pragmatics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Common ground and the presuppositions of questions
entry.summary: Authors: Fabrizio Macagno DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2025-8005 Pages: Page range: 27-51

entry.title: Ostensible ritual aggression in ChineseXiangqigames
entry.summary: Authors: Wenrui Shi, Dániel Z. Kádár DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2025-8002 Pages: Page range: 27-64

entry.title: The influence of guilt and shame on L1 and L2 apology speech acts in academic contexts
entry.summary: Authors: Lucía Martín Pérez, Irini Mavrou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2025-8006 Pages: Page range: 65-92

entry.title: Identifying two interactional functions ofen fait(‘in fact, actually’) in L2 French: a mixed-methods approach
entry.summary: Authors: Melissa Juillet, Fanny Forsberg Lundell, Klara Skogmyr Marian, Simona Pekarek Doehler DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2026-0047 Pages: Page range: 93-122
